programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thanksgiving can strike fear into the heart of even the most proficient cook. However with our turkey and sweet potato casserole recipes, we minimize the work so that the cook can enjoy the holiday as much as everyone else.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare an Indian-inspired shrimp curry and a Thai-inspired green curry with chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: If you're a fan of saucy barbecued chicken, you'll love pulled chicken. Similar to the more traditional pulled pork, it's simply tender shreds of smoky grilled chicken moistened with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Summer desserts are all about fruit. As inviting as a bowl of sweet berries can be, there's something about baked fruit desserts that we can't resist. In this episode we take a look at two summer favorites: blueberry cobbler and free-form fruit tart.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está buscando un autobús escolar desaparecido lleno de alumnos en Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un seguidor de un conocido orador motivacional es asesinado, el equipo sospecha del propio orador.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Jugadores energéticos
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave se retira, Erin debe traer a un informante protegido de la mafia a Nueva York y mantenerlo a salvo con ayuda de Danny y Maria. Frank mantiene tensas negociaciones con el alcalde Poole.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Sin salida
programme.desc: Un hombre emocionalmente perturbado retiene a Maria como rehén a punta de pistola en una sala de interrogatorios. Danny debe cumplir sus demandas para protegerla. Mientras, Frank enfrenta un dilema personal y moral.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Gajes del oficio
programme.desc: Erin se siente conmocionada por un asaltante que irrumpe en su apartamento. Jamie y Eddie descubren una bomba en el apartamento de una anciana. Frank investiga una organización benéfica sospechosa.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Langston testifica en el juicio de un respetado congresista, nuevas pruebas envían al equipo de CSI de vuelta al laboratorio para reabrir la investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo acude a tres escenarios de diferentes crímenes en una misma noche. Aparentemente, no están relacionados, pero las pruebas forenses de cada caso revela un vínculo común.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI va a la escena del crimen en un motel familiar, Nick comienza a relacionar tres asesinatos que se han cometido allí ese año.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Riley son tomados como rehenes después de un tiroteo en una comunidad normalmente tranquila de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un antiguo alumno de Ray es asesinado. La investigación les llevará hasta el mundo de la lucha libre mexicana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Sara regresa inesperadamente, el equipo de CSI se une para investigar la muerte de una famosa joven actriz fallecida en un dudoso accidente de tránsito.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un productor de pornografía y un traficante de drogas son encontrados muertos en un área exclusiva de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI centra su investigación en los miembros del vecindario.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos compañeros de oficina conspiran para robar un casino, su plan termina con los CSI investigando un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: En la hermosa Miami, se están usando medusas mortales como arma asesina y regresa una misteriosa mujer del pasado de Jesse.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La investigación sobre la muerte de un trabajador del censo coloca al equipo en una persecución de autos a alta velocidad y en una explosión que amenaza la vida de dos CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Eric Delko regresa a Miami como testigo experto de la defensa y enfrenta a sus viejos amigos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la novia de Estados Unidos, Phoebe Nichols, arde en llamas durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI expone el lado oscuro del estrellato pop.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El extraño caso de un hombre cortado por la mitad desconcierta a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, mientras que la lesión de Natalia pone a Ryan y a ella en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI tienen 24 horas para descubrir si un hombre condenado a muerte es realmente culpable y Eric Delko vuelve a trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI resuelven el homicidio de un hombre que fue asesinado en el espacio exterior antes de devolver su cuerpo a la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y Delko deben viajar a la brillante y soleada Los Ángeles cuando un secreto del pasado de Jesse quizá permita que un asesino quede libre.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de primavera elevan la cantidad de muertos en Miami cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se separan para resolver tres asesinatos diferentes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El espíritu de una víctima no dejará a Calleigh en paz hasta que ella haga justicia por su asesinato. Debe contar con la ayuda de Horatio y el resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In the culmination of a multi-episode mystery, the CSI New York team of investigators uncovers the dark lair of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.desc: Dos criminales secuestran a la mujer equivocada.

programme.desc: Un parque de atracciones del futuro satisface las fantasías de cualquier adulto. Unos androides muy realistas complacen todo tipo de caprichos. Divertido, ¿verdad? No tanto, como descubren un reportero y su secretaria durante una fiesta para la prensa…

programme.title: Te amaré en silencio

programme.title: Juego de honor
programme.desc: Basada en una increíble historia de la vida real, Juego de Honor es un inspirado retrato del polémico entrenador de baloncesto Ken Carter.

programme.title: Hotel Rwanda
programme.desc: Cuando Paul Rusesabagina (Cheadle) ve que el mundo no va a intervenir en la masacre de la minoría tutsi, encuentra el coraje para abrir las puertas de su hotel a más de 1.200 refugiados.

programme.title: No sin mi hija
programme.desc: Sally Field ofrece una interpretación electrizante en esta convincente historia real de Betty Mahmoody, una mujer estadounidense que, junto con su hija, queda atrapada en Irán, engañada por su marido al visitar su país natal.

programme.title: Venganza

programme.desc: Cuando una erupción volcánica en Islandia envía un glaciar a América del Norte, una familia lucha por escapar de la embestida de la próxima era glacial.

programme.desc: Un veterano de Vietnam que se convierte en un héroe local luego de salvar a un hombre de unos atacantes en un autobús, decide tomar acción cuando su mejor amigo es asesinado y la policía demuestra poco interés en resolver el crimen.

programme.title: La gran pelea
programme.desc: Cuando el campeón mundial de peso pesado es enviado a la cárcel, todo apunta a un inevitable enfrentamiento con el invicto campeón de la prisión.

programme.title: Robotech

programme.title: Eden of the East
programme.desc: Ohsugi's life is on the line as Takizawa and the Johnny Hunter engage in a game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de la esposa de un prominente banquero llevó a la policía a una persecución inútil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este caso internacional de extorsión, asesinato e identidades robadas, el estafador Albert J. Walker asume la identidad del compañero de trabajo, Ronald Platt. Platt luego aparece muerto en un océano con un ancla atada alrededor de su torso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring a dinosaur graveyard in Patagonia to gain a better understanding of dinosaur evolution, particularly the Middle Jurassic period when they became gigantic.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor inadvertently ruins a game.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must participate in a game.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Placed on trial by his peers, the Doctor is forced to watch events from his past.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor has an appointment with the Immortal.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With the black light converter destroyed, the Doctor fears for the planet's safety.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is foxed by Drathro's logic.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor sees TARDIS arrive on Thoros-Beta.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The scientist Crozier keeps making promises he can't keep.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Kiv's brain rejects his new body and Crozier is forced to rethink his plan.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sil is appalled to realize Crozier has selected Peri to be the Kiv's new host body.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: A series of murders leads the Doctor to suspect something strange is happening.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Vervoids begin to attack the crew and passengers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Commadore loses command of his ship.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor realizes something about the Vervoids life span.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Valeyard's true identity is revealed and the trial aborted.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Mel realizes that the Valeyard has created a weapon within the Matrix.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is sent to a skybase orbiting the planet of Solos in the 30th century, where he must deliver a sealed message pod; on the planet below, something is transforming the human population into hideous mutants.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface, taking Jo with him; the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor gives the box to Ky, revealing the contents to be scrolls written in the language of the Old Ones.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make a discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo are once again sent into danger by the Time Lords when they are given a vital message capsule to deliver.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Marshal is on trial, with the Doctor as chief witness; Jo and the Doctor's friends are the Marshal's prisoners.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: An alien crashes in medieval England.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah stows away aboard the TARDIS.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Irongron attacks Sir Edward's castle.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Linx prepares to take off.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor receives a mysterious package from his old companion, Jo Grant.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Those surviving the massacre in Moldavia are separated and held at the palace; Krystle and Alexis are imprisoned in the palace dungeon; Sammy Jo reveals her scheme to Rita; Fallon, suffering from amnesia, reacts to seeing the name Colby.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: In the late stages of this European Poker Tour Main Event, mistakes are starting to creep in. But there's no margin for error, with millions still on the line. Among the final 23 are American pro Stephen Song and former EPT finalist Rania Nasreddine.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: All eyes are on the USA's Rania Nasreddine, as she tries to make back-to-back European Poker Tour final tables. Brazilian pro Fabiano Kovalski is another previous EPT finalist looking for a second chance at victory.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Nine remain in the Main Event. Two are on course to make history. One will be crowned champion and earn $1.5m. The USA's Stephen Song and Rania Nasreddine are among the players battling chip leader Fabiano Kovalski for supremacy.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: It's the final table of the Main Event and the conclusion of the European Poker Tour's 20th anniversary celebrations. Three American players, including Rania Nasreddine, are among the final six.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The €100,000 Super High Roller reaches its finale with six elite players vying for nearly €1.4 million. 2015 Monte Carlo Main Event champion Adrian Mateos, faces off against poker heavyweights Mikita Badziakouski, László Bujtas, and Marius Gierse.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: After a three-year hiatus, the prestigious EPT Monte Carlo €5,000 Main Event returns in spectacular fashion. Day 2 brings together poker's biggest names.

programme.title: The Comeback with Craig Carton
programme.desc: Craig Carton sits down with those who have experienced the highs and lows of gambling addiction to amplify their stories, break down the stigma surrounding gambling disorder, raise awareness of support resources for individuals and their families.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Tension mounts as the money bubble approaches in Monte Carlo's Main Event. With 159 players set to cash for at least €8,690, every decision matters. EPT legends Patrik Antonius and Davidi Kitai command the feature table.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The money bubble has burst, but for seasoned pro Ole Schemion-who has earned over $5 million in Monte Carlo alone-a minimum cash isn't enough. He faces a formidable challenge from French star Gaëlle Baumann and online legend Jussi Nevanlinna.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: PSPC champion Ramon Colillas surges into the top five as just 40 players remain in the EPT Monte Carlo Main Event. Day 3 intensifies as competitors battle to reach the final two tables.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The field narrows to just 16 survivors, including EPT Dublin champion Niall Farrell and PSPC winner Ramon Colillas. With over €41,000 already locked up, the stakes couldn't be higher as players fight for their place at the final table of nine.
